features.name: PR Fetch & URL Auto-Parse
features.description: Fetch PR metadata and raw diff from GitHub API; parse GitHub PR URL to extract owner/repo/number
features.evidence: github.ts service, parseGitHubPrUrl in shared, all tests pass

features.name: AST Semantic Diff Analysis
features.description: Tree-sitter WASM parsing of TS/TSX/JS files; function/import/export-level change detection with regex fallback

features.name: Multi-Model AI Review Pipeline
features.description: 4-stage pipeline: Summary → Risk×2 (parallel) → Consensus Merge → Suggestion; SSE streaming to frontend

features.name: LLM Provider Abstraction Layer
features.description: Unified interface for Anthropic, Google Gemini, OpenAI, and OpenAI-compatible APIs; per-stage independent model config
features.evidence: llm-client.ts, llm-config.ts, settings UI, tests pass

features.name: Race Condition Detection
features.description: Local AST-based concurrency pattern extraction (async/promise/shared-state); LLM-enriched execution path analysis; timeline visualization

features.name: Cross-File Impact Heatmap
features.description: Import/export dependency graph construction; impact scoring algorithm per file; visual heatmap component

features.name: SSE Streaming + Real-Time UI
features.description: Server-Sent Events pipeline streaming; progressive UI rendering per stage; AbortController cancellation support
features.evidence: ReviewResult.tsx SSE handling, PipelineProgress.tsx, client.ts streaming

features.name: Review History Persistence
features.description: Auto-save completed reviews as JSON files; history list page; cached review loading (no re-analysis); Settings store

features.name: Light/Dark Theme + Visual Polish
features.description: Dual color system; prism spectrum gradients; glass-morphism styling; framer-motion staged animations; GPU-composited refraction effects
features.evidence: ThemeToggle.tsx, Tailwind config, glass-surface/linear-text design tokens

features.name: Incremental Review (per-push)
features.description: Update review on each push; analyze only newly changed portions, preserving prior results
features.evidence: IncrementalReviewService orchestrates diff-by-file filtering, preserved findings, and incremental-only pipeline runs; /stream endpoint reads req.body.incremental to choose path; frontend handles incremental:delta/preserved events and renders IncrementalDeltaBanner; 154 tests pass, lint/typecheck clean

features.name: Historical Similar PR Risk Warning
features.description: Vector embedding of review findings; similarity search against history; alert on recurring risk patterns across PRs

features.name: Review Quality Self-Scoring
features.description: Auto-score review quality per run; trend analysis over time; confidence calibration metrics

features.name: PR Comment Auto-Post to GitHub
features.description: Post review findings as GitHub PR comments using GitHub Suggestion format; configurable severity threshold for auto-posting
features.evidence: Manual trigger via Post to GitHub button on review result page; severity filter critical+warning; PR Review COMMENT format; 148 tests pass, init.sh clean

features.name: GitLab + Gitee Support
features.description: Extend PR fetching and review to GitLab merge requests and Gitee pull requests

features.name: Consensus Confidence Visualization
features.description: Enhanced dual-model agreement visualization; per-issue confidence bars; model disagreement zone highlighting

features.name: VS Code Extension
features.description: Inline PR review results in VS Code; gutter markers for issues; quick-fix suggestions; sidebar panel for full pipeline

features.name: Team Custom Review Rules (YAML)
features.description: YAML-based configurable review rules; team-specific patterns; per-repo rule presets

features.name: AI-Generated Code Hallucination Detection
features.description: Detect calls to non-existent APIs; references to undefined symbols; fabricated library functions in AI-generated code

features.name: Open API + Webhook Event Stream
features.description: Public REST API for review integration; webhook events for pipeline lifecycle; third-party tool integration

features.name: Runtime Behavior Analysis Integration
features.description: Optional dynamic analysis hook; runtime trace of changed code paths; detect runtime-only issues not visible in static analysis
